author: doll-agent
content: Implemented atleast_1d/atleast_2d/atleast_3d in ferray-core::manipulation::extended (single-array form). Re-exported at top level via ferray crate. 9 unit tests cover scalar/1d/2d/3d/passthrough cases. cargo test passes (609 ferray-core tests); cargo clippy --features stride-tricks clean.
